channel.title: Tech Library
channel.description: Free tech tutorials, tools, lexicon, and digital survival guides

item.title: WSL2 Complete Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Run a full Linux kernel inside Windows — install, manage, and configure WSL2.

item.title: Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) — Tech Library
item.description: Guide to installing and using WSL2 on Windows.

item.title: WireGuard VPN — Tech Library
item.description: Set up a fast, modern, and audited VPN with WireGuard — the new gold standard for secure tunnels.

item.title: Windows Task Scheduler Automation — Tech Library
item.description: Automate tasks with Task Scheduler, triggers, conditions, and PowerShell integration.

item.title: Windows Task Automation — Tech Library
item.description: Automate Windows with Task Scheduler, scheduled tasks via PowerShell, startup scripts, and event-triggered automation.

item.title: Windows Keyboard Shortcuts — Tech Library
item.description: Essential Windows keyboard shortcuts for power users — desktop, file explorer, task manager, virtual desktops, and hidden shortcuts.

item.title: Windows Recovery & Rescue — Tech Library
item.description: Windows Recovery Environment, DISM, SFC, bootrec, system restore, restore points, advanced startup, and repairing Windows without reinstalling.

item.title: Windows Registry Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Understand and edit the Windows Registry — regedit, reg.exe, .reg files, common tweaks, backup/restore, and safety.

item.title: Windows Registry Hacks & Tweaks — Tech Library
item.description: Advanced registry tricks for performance, UI, security, and automation.

item.title: PowerShell Scripting — Tech Library
item.description: Go beyond basic PowerShell — functions, modules, error handling, remoting, scheduled jobs, and script security.

item.title: Windows Hardening Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Harden Windows 10/11 — Attack Surface Reduction, Windows Defender, AppLocker, BitLocker, user account security, and group policy.

item.title: Windows Event Viewer & Troubleshooting — Tech Library
item.description: Master Event Viewer for system diagnostics and troubleshooting.

item.title: Windows Environment Variables — Tech Library
item.description: Understand and manage Windows environment variables — PATH, system vs user, setx, PowerShell, and common use cases.

item.title: Windows Deployment Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Everything from clean installs and bootable media to unattended setups, imaging, and Sysprep — covering Windows 10 and 11.

item.title: Windows Defender & Security Center Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Configure Microsoft Defender, ASR rules, firewall, and ransomware protection.

item.title: Windows Debloating & Optimization — Tech Library
item.description: A complete guide to removing bloatware, disabling telemetry, and optimizing Windows 10/11 for performance and privacy.

item.title: Essential Windows Applications — Tech Library
item.description: A comprehensive guide to the best free Windows software — from system utilities to development tools, all hand-picked for quality and usefulness. Every app here is free or open-source.

item.title: Wi-Fi Security Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Secure your Wi-Fi network — WPA2/WPA3, 802.1X, guest networks, deauth protection, and auditing.

item.title: WebSockets & Real-Time Communication — Tech Library
item.description: Build real-time apps with WebSockets, Socket.IO, and WebRTC.

item.title: Web Scraping with Python — Tech Library
item.description: Extract data from websites using Python, BeautifulSoup, Requests, and modern scraping techniques.

item.title: VS Code Setup & Extensions — Tech Library
item.description: A comprehensive guide to setting up VS Code for development.

item.title: VPN Setup Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Set up WireGuard and OpenVPN — server configuration, client setup, key generation, routing, and troubleshooting.

item.title: VirtualBox vs VMware vs Hyper-V — Tech Library
item.description: Compare the major hypervisors for desktop and server virtualization.

item.title: Virtual Machines Guide — Tech Library
item.description: A beginner's guide to virtual machines with VirtualBox and VMware.

item.title: Ventoy Advanced Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Multi-boot USB mastery — run dozens of ISOs from a single drive without reformatting.

item.title: Vencord & Vesktop — Tech Library
item.description: Mod your Discord client with plugins, themes, and quality-of-life improvements using Vencord and the standalone Vesktop client.

item.title: TypeScript — Tech Library
item.description: JavaScript with superpowers — static types, interfaces, generics, and modern tooling.

item.title: Two-Factor Authentication Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Everything you need to know about 2FA, TOTP, hardware keys, passkeys, and securing your accounts with a second factor.

item.title: Torrent Clients Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Complete guide to qBittorrent, Transmission, and Deluge torrent clients. Installation, configuration, VPN binding, port forwarding, and optimization.

item.title: Tmux Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Terminal multiplexing with tmux — sessions, windows, panes, keybindings, customisation, and pair programming.

item.title: Time Management Guide for Students — Tech Library
item.description: Master your schedule with proven time management techniques.

item.title: Software Testing 101 — Tech Library
item.description: Master unit, integration, and E2E testing with pytest, Vitest, and Playwright.

item.title: Terraform Infrastructure as Code — Tech Library
item.description: Learn Terraform — HCL, providers, state management, modules, and workspaces.

item.title: Telegram Privacy Guide — Tech Library
item.description: A comprehensive walkthrough of every Telegram privacy setting to lock down your account and protect your identity.

item.title: Tails OS Guide — Tech Library
item.description: A complete walkthrough of Tails — the amnesic incognito live system that leaves no trace and routes everything through Tor.

item.title: systemd Services — Tech Library
item.description: Creating and managing systemd service units for background processes, daemons, and scheduled tasks.

item.title: Systemd Service Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Create and manage systemd services, timers, sockets, and targets — journalctl, unit files, and troubleshooting.

item.title: SVG Animation with CSS & JS — Tech Library
item.description: Create smooth, interactive SVG animations using CSS, JavaScript, and GSAP.

item.title: Subnetting & CIDR Explained — Tech Library
item.description: Understand IP subnetting, CIDR notation, VLSM, and subnet calculation.

item.title: SSL & HTTPS Certificates — Tech Library
item.description: Understand TLS, get free certificates with Let's Encrypt, and secure your web services properly.

item.title: SSH Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Master the Secure Shell — keys, config, tunneling, and remote administration.

item.title: SQL Database Basics — Tech Library
item.description: Learn Structured Query Language — from simple SELECT queries to complex JOINs and subqueries.

item.title: Advanced SQL Queries & Optimization — Tech Library
item.description: Master window functions, CTEs, indexing, and query performance tuning.

item.title: Spicetify — Tech Library
item.description: Customize the Spotify desktop client with themes, extensions, and custom CSS using the Spicetify CLI modding tool.

item.title: Social Media Privacy Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Platform-by-platform privacy settings, data deletion guides, app permissions, and privacy-focused alternatives to mainstream social media.

item.title: Social Engineering Awareness Guide — Tech Library
item.description: Recognize and defend against phishing, pretexting, baiting, and manipulation tactics.

item.title: SMT System Multitool Guide — Tech Library
item.description: SMT (System Multitool) is a batch-powered Windows utility collection with over 90 tools for networking, system configuration, activation, security research, and more.

item.title: Shizuku & Hail — Tech Library
item.description: Manage system apps, debloat your device, and freeze/unfreeze apps without root using Shizuku and Hail.

item.title: Security Breach Response — Tech Library
item.description: A comprehensive step-by-step guide for identifying, containing, and recovering from a security breach — from immediate triage to full system restoration.

item.title: Seal & ulapp — Tech Library
item.description: Android video downloader (Seal) and LAN file sharing app (ulapp) for offline media.
